title: Check your eligibility - Canada.ca
content:
## Check your eligibility
Applying for funding takes time and effort. To help determine if your organization may be eligible for funding under the National AccessAbility Week (NAAW) 2026 Call for Proposals (CFP), please answer a few short questions.
Before answering the questions, we recommend reviewing the program eligibility criteria to better understand the eligibility requirements.
Important : This questionnaire is not a funding application. Being potentially eligible does not guarantee approval. All applications are subject to a screening and review process.
For clarity, we suggest opening this glossary , which defines key terms used throughout the questionnaire.
You are now ready to start the self-assessment eligibility questionnaire for the 2026 NAAW CFP .
You may be eligible for funding.
Before deciding to apply for funding, you should review the program funding page to learn more about all the requirements of this funding opportunity and how to prepare to apply .
Please contact us if you have any questions.
You may not be eligible for funding.
This funding opportunity might not be right for you.  You should review the program eligibility criteria to learn more about the requirements of this funding opportunity before deciding to apply.
You may want to explore other funding opportunities available through Employment and Social Development Canada.
Please contact us if you have any questions.
Your project may not be eligible for funding.
This funding opportunity might not be right for you.  You should review the program eligibility criteria to learn more about the requirements of this funding opportunity before deciding to apply.
You may want to explore other funding opportunities available through Employment and Social Development Canada.
Please contact us if you have any questions.
Your organization may not be eligible for funding.
This funding opportunity might not be right for you. You should review the program eligibility criteria to learn more about the requirements before deciding to apply.
You may want to explore other funding opportunities available through Employment and Social Development Canada.
Please contact us if you have any questions.
